caption: A woman with dark hair is seated indoors, positioned in front of a light-colored wall and a window with pale yellow and blue curtains. She wears a striped purple and white shirt and a black headset with a microphone. The text "Nancy Ramya" appears in the bottom left corner of each shot. Throughout the sequence, she looks toward the camera while speaking, her facial expressions shifting as she talks. In the first image, her mouth is slightly open; as the sequence progresses, she continues to articulate words, with her lips moving and her expression remaining focused. A light-colored surface, possibly a desk or shelf, is partially visible behind her on the right. The lighting is soft and consistent across the frames, and the camera remains stationary, focusing on her head and shoulders.
